improvements.prompt_change: Explicitly require at least one assertion that each required structured event name is emitted (including trapi_request_sent and blob_write_succeeded), even when orchestration dependencies are monkeypatched.
improvements.reason: Code review identified partial acceptance-criteria coverage for logging events.

improvements.prompt_change: Add an instruction to remove unused imports and run a quick lint-equivalent check in modified test files before submitting.
improvements.reason: Code review identified an unused import in the new test module.

improvements.prompt_change: When an acceptance criterion references func start, require either executing func start or explicitly documenting tool unavailability with a compensating verification step.
improvements.reason: Environment lacked Azure Functions Core Tools, leaving one acceptance criterion unverifiable directly.
